source: Hourly 2025 SE4 day-ahead prices (lund_2025_elpris_SE4.csv) intersected with SMHI station 53430 global irradiance (lund_2025_param120.csv). Solar-weighted mean uses W/m^2 as the weight, so the result approximates the average SEK/kWh a Lund rooftop PV system actually displaces from the grid. Prefer this over the Nord Pool 2022-2024 flat average for SE4 payback.
